negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Wallet verification for FHE does not include fhe_escrow_lockup(FHE_MAX_LAYERS); FHE reaches the unsupported-precompile path.
related_but_insufficient_code: FHE_PRECOMPILE is registered and payload validation has an FHE branch.
verify_wallet_for_commitment has branches for LLM, HTTP, long-running HTTP, DKMS, ZK, sovereign agent, persistent agent, and audio, but no FHE branch.
No fhe_escrow_lockup or FHE_MAX_LAYERS symbol exists in the audited v2.2 port checkout.

notes: Run verify_wallet_for_commitment for FHE_PRECOMPILE with sufficient balance and lock; the current code returns unsupported instead of requiring max-layer FHE escrow.
rationale: The diff imports FHE_PRECOMPILE, FHE_MAX_LAYERS, and fhe_escrow_lockup, then adds an FHE branch that uses fhe_escrow_lockup(FHE_MAX_LAYERS) as the executor fee. The commit message states FHE uses fhe_escrow_lockup for fee calculation. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: Wallet verification for the FHE precompile address 0x0807 must include an executor fee equal to fhe_escrow_lockup(FHE_MAX_LAYERS).
suggested_falsification_tests: Run wallet fee verification for an FHE async request and assert total_required_fees includes fhe_escrow_lockup(FHE_MAX_LAYERS) plus commitment/inclusion/callback components.
summary: FHE max-layer wallet escrow is not implemented in the port.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Run wallet fee verification for an FHE async request and assert total_required_fees includes fhe_escrow_lockup(FHE_MAX_LAYERS) plus commitment/inclusion/callback components.
title: FHE wallet escrow uses max layers
